articles.title: Notice: Security Copilot will be included as part of your Microsoft 365 E5 plan soon
Microsoft Purview: Data Security Investigations – Introducing new personal data examination

Microsoft Teams: Intelligent recap can now be generated without retaining a transcript after the meeting. Meeting organizers can choose this setting from the meeting options before the meeting, or organizers and eligible participants can enable it during the meeting. After the meeting, the AI Summary will be available, but other elements of the recap may not be available (Chapters, Topics, Mentions, Audio recap)
SharePoint: Entra B2B integration for external sharing in OneDrive & SharePoint
Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Federated Copilot Connectors
Microsoft Teams town halls now support backup Real-Time Messaging Protocol (RTMP) streams
Outlook: Improved handling of disallowed and failed email reactions
View and edit Markdown files in OneDrive and SharePoint
Teams Phone user multi-line support on Teams Phone devices
Introducing video recap for Microsoft Teams meetings

Microsoft Copilot Studio – Tool & Topic Invocation Grader

Microsoft Viva: Modernized content composition experience in Engage
